name: MissCutie Robot
description: A Telegram modular group management bot.

TOKEN.description: Your bot token. Get one from @BotFather on Telegram.

API_ID.description: Get API_ID from my.telegram.org, used for telethon based modules.

API_HASH.description: Get API_HASH from my.telegram.org, used for telethon based modules.

OWNER_ID.description: Your user ID as an integer.

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Your Telegram support group chat username where users will ask for help.

EVENT_LOGS.description: Event logs channel to note important bot level events.

JOIN_LOGGER.description: Channel where the bot will print who added it to groups.

TIME_API_KEY.description: API key for timezone information. Get from https://timezonedb.com/api

DEV_USERS.description: IDs of bot developer users. Add yours if needed.

STRICT_GBAN.description: Enforce gbans across new and old groups.

DRAGONS.description: Space-separated list of user IDs as sudo users.

ENV.description: Set to ANYTHING to enable environment variables. Leave as is.

WEBHOOK.description: Set to ANYTHING to enable webhooks. Leave as is if unsure.

PORT.description: Port to use for webhooks. Leave as is on Heroku.

No_LOAD.description: Modules not to load, space separated.

ALLOW_EXCL.description: Set to True for '!' as a command prefix along with '/'. Recommended is True.

DEL_CMDS.description: Set to True to delete unauthorized command messages.

AI_API_KEY.description: API key for Intellivoid's chatbot API. Get from https://coffeehouse.intellivoid.net/

WALL_API.description: API key for wallpapers. Get from https://wall.alphacoders.com/
